brand.subtitle: A Cabinet of Curiosities for the Memetic Age
brand.aesthetic: 90s clipart surrealism, frutiger aero adjacent, found-media collage

front_matter: Epigraph from MGS2 Colonel / memetic theory

ponderable_template.title: One-line ponderable title
ponderable_template.clipart: Full or partial page clipart illustration
ponderable_template.footnotes: Seymour's 'annotations' - mix of real research and fiction

clipart_integration.style: Curated 90s clipart, sometimes unmodified, sometimes collaged
clipart_integration.captioning: Each clipart gets a 'Seymour classification' caption
clipart_integration.recontextualization: Clipart removed from original context, placed in memetic allegory
clipart_integration.vectorization: Key recurring clipart vectorized for series identity

cross_reference_system.internal: See also: Ponderable X.Y (Vol X, Entry Y)
cross_reference_system.external: Real-world citations in footnotes (Dawkins, Blackmore, etc.)
cross_reference_system.fictional: References to Seymour's other books, fictional authorities
cross_reference_system.colonel_protocol: MGS2 Colonel quotes as structural epigraphs

production_pipeline.clipart_processing: Pipeline: ISO -> extract -> categorize -> select -> place
